steps.title: Identify what needs a pronoun
steps.content: The blank needs to refer to “an object,” which is singular and just mentioned in the previous sentence.

steps.title: Apply pronoun rules
steps.content:
”It” is the personal pronoun used to refer to a singular noun, and it matches the antecedent in number. “These” is eliminated for being plural; “this” and “that” are demonstrative pronouns, which aren't used for established antecedents in Standard English.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
